pages.text: $(italic)Botania$() — the master guide to the flower-magic mod: every petal, every thread of mana, every device. Botania expects you to read it, and almost nothing else explains the mod.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + any $(italic)flower$(). $(italic)Novus swaps the usual sapling for a flower so the recipe doesn't clash with Dynamic Trees.$()
pages.title: Lexica Botania
